column1: どうやら電車が遅れているらしい。
column2: どうやらでんしゃがおくれているらしい。
column3: It seems the trains are running late.
column4: どうやら (apparently, it seems, looks like — tentative conclusion from evidence)
column5: どうやら + [tentative conclusion] + らしい/ようだ/そうだ
column6: signals a tentative conclusion drawn from available evidence; speaker is not certain but has good reason to believe
column8: どうやら = tentative inference from observable evidence; らしい = seems/apparently (hearsay or evidence); 確かに = certainly; おそらく = probably (more confident)
